title: Armor Pod
description: Provides a block that allows storage or quick swapping of your current armor set
body:
![ArmorPods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8wmMlvGh/images/15ef918d0506e76f61f9decff418eb6426d5c73f.png)

This mod provides a simple block that is able to hold a single set of armor, when placed in the world and activated by a player the armor pod will swap whatever is currently being worn with the contents of the pod.

The pod itself can be accessed in world as a block or as an item when held by the player by sneak-clicking.
When in world the pod has a partially implemented locking feature with doors that can opened or closed by sneak-clicking the block.

Color variants can be crafted in the smithing table using any pod with the desired dye.

![Requires Fabric API](https://images2.imgbox.com/8e/38/bfInI5qv_o.png)
